channel.title: Tooling on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Tooling on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Toolboxes in Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry Toolboxes are now generally available. They provide a unified endpoint for commonly used tools in prompt agents and can also be invoked outside prompt agents.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: devops+ai: 🔥Designing Specialized Agents - Model Selection, Tool Scoping, and Output Contracts🔥
item.description:
The article frames specialized agents as being given a limited toolbox and clear instructions. It points to three design areas: choosing the model, scoping the tools it can use, and defining output contracts.

  • Source: Let’s do DevOps
